meta.description: Input crash situation descriptions for LLM-driven scenario generation

situations.description: A sedan runs a red light at 40 mph and T-bones an SUV crossing through the intersection on a green signal.
Four cars are stopped at a red light. A distracted driver in a fifth sedan approaches at 45 mph and rear-ends the back of the queue.
A pickup truck makes an unprotected left turn at an intersection and is struck by an oncoming motorcycle traveling at 35 mph.
Two sedans in adjacent parking spaces reverse out simultaneously without checking mirrors, colliding at low speed.
A pedestrian dashes into the road from behind a parked car. A sedan traveling at 25 mph cannot stop in time.
A sedan changes lanes without checking its blind spot and sideswipes another sedan traveling in the adjacent lane at 35 mph.
A wrong-way driver enters a one-way street at 25 mph and collides head-on with an oncoming sedan at 35 mph.
A cyclist riding at 15 mph along parked cars is struck by a suddenly opened car door.
A sedan rolls through a stop sign at 15 mph and is hit by a cross-traffic SUV traveling at 40 mph.
A lead sedan brakes hard for debris on the road. The trailing sedan at 35 mph cannot stop in time and rear-ends it.
An SUV accelerates through a yellow-turning-red light at 45 mph and T-bones a pickup entering the intersection from the cross street.
A motorcycle following too closely rear-ends a sedan that brakes suddenly for a pedestrian in a crosswalk.
A jogger crosses the road at a non-crosswalk location. An SUV traveling at 30 mph crests a small hill and strikes the pedestrian.
A pickup truck drifts into the adjacent lane while the driver is distracted, sideswiping a motorcycle at 40 mph.
A sedan drifts across the center line on a two-lane road and hits an oncoming pickup head-on. Combined speed over 60 mph.
A cyclist enters an intersection against the signal and is struck by a sedan traveling through on a green light at 30 mph.
Three sedans are queued at a stop sign. An SUV approaching at 35 mph fails to notice the queue and rear-ends the last vehicle.
A sedan backing out of a parking space collides with a pedestrian walking behind the vehicle.
An ambulance proceeding through a red light at 25 mph is struck by a sedan that failed to yield from the cross street at 35 mph.
A motorcycle traveling at 20 mph in the right lane clips an open car door from a vehicle parked in the adjacent parking lane.
A sedan stopped at a traffic light is rear-ended by a pickup truck traveling at 25 mph on wet pavement.
A motorcycle runs a stop sign at 30 mph and collides with the side of a sedan crossing the intersection.
A child runs into the street chasing a ball. A pickup truck at 20 mph swerves but cannot avoid the pedestrian.
Two sedans merge into the same lane simultaneously from opposite sides, sideswiping each other at 30 mph.
A sedan overtaking a slow vehicle crosses into oncoming traffic and hits an SUV head-on at a combined speed of 70 mph.
A sedan making a right turn on red is struck by a motorcycle proceeding straight through the intersection at 40 mph.
A sedan tailgating at 50 mph rear-ends the car ahead when it brakes for a slowing vehicle two cars ahead in a chain reaction.
An SUV backing out of a driveway at low speed collides with a cyclist passing on the sidewalk.
An elderly pedestrian is crossing at a marked crosswalk. A sedan turning right at 15 mph fails to see them and strikes the pedestrian.
A pickup truck blows through a flashing red signal at 35 mph and T-bones an SUV entering from the cross street on a flashing yellow.
A motorcycle splitting lanes at 25 mph clips the mirror of a sedan that begins changing lanes without signaling.
Two sedans approach each other on a narrow two-lane road. One drifts over the center line and they collide head-on at 25 mph each.
A bicycle stops suddenly at an intersection. A sedan following at 20 mph cannot brake in time and hits the cyclist from behind.
Two SUVs enter a four-way stop intersection simultaneously from perpendicular roads, each assuming the other will yield.
A pedestrian steps off the curb while looking at their phone. A motorcycle traveling at 30 mph swerves but makes contact.
A sedan driving at 40 mph in fog rear-ends a stopped pickup truck that has pulled over with hazard lights on.
A sedan making an unprotected left turn at 10 mph is hit by an oncoming SUV that had no time to brake at 45 mph.
An SUV merging onto a road sideswipes a sedan already in the travel lane at 35 mph.
A passenger exits a parked sedan into the bike lane. A cyclist at 12 mph collides with the open door.
A pickup truck backing out of a diagonal parking space hits the front fender of a sedan passing through the parking aisle at 10 mph.
A sedan runs a red arrow while turning left and is struck broadside by an oncoming pickup truck at 40 mph.
Two motorcycles are following each other. The lead motorcycle brakes for a turning car and the trailing motorcycle at 35 mph rear-ends it.
A motorcycle crosses the center line while cornering and collides head-on with a sedan at a combined 50 mph.
A sedan at 35 mph strikes a pedestrian who stepped into the road from between two parked SUVs.
A sedan drifts left and sideswipes a pickup truck in the adjacent lane on a two-lane road at 40 mph.
An SUV fails to yield at a yield sign and is T-boned by a sedan with right of way traveling at 35 mph.
A sedan brakes hard to avoid hitting a pedestrian jaywalking. The SUV behind at 30 mph rear-ends the sedan.
A pedestrian crosses a road at night wearing dark clothing. An SUV at 40 mph does not see them until impact.
A bicycle runs a stop sign and is hit by a pickup truck crossing the intersection at 30 mph.
Six sedans queued in bumper-to-bumper traffic. An SUV at 20 mph hits the back of the line, causing a chain reaction.
A pickup truck swerves to avoid debris and crosses into oncoming traffic, hitting a sedan head-on at 30 mph each.
Two pickup trucks traveling side by side at 35 mph both drift toward each other and sideswipe.
A sedan misjudges the gap while turning left across traffic and is struck by an oncoming sedan at 40 mph.
A sedan reversing in a parking lot at 5 mph backs into a motorcycle parked directly behind it.
A group of pedestrians crosses at a crosswalk. A sedan turning right at 20 mph fails to yield and hits one pedestrian.
An SUV at 50 mph rear-ends a slow-moving bicycle traveling at 10 mph on a road with no bike lane.
A motorcycle traveling at 50 mph runs a stale red light and T-bones a sedan making a protected left turn at 15 mph.
A wrong-way sedan enters a road at 30 mph. An oncoming motorcycle at 40 mph has no time to react.
A sedan at 45 mph changes lanes abruptly to make an exit and clips an SUV in the right lane.
A delivery driver opens a van door into the bike lane. A cyclist at 18 mph cannot avoid the door and crashes into it.
Two sedans enter an uncontrolled intersection from perpendicular streets at the same time, both traveling 25 mph.
A pickup truck at 40 mph rear-ends a sedan that stopped suddenly to avoid a car backing out of a driveway.
A pickup truck at 30 mph strikes a pedestrian who freezes in the middle of an unmarked crossing.
A sedan rolling through a yield sign at 20 mph is hit by a motorcycle at 35 mph that had the right of way.
A motorcycle at 30 mph filters between lanes and sideswipes a sedan whose driver opens the door slightly in stopped traffic.
Two sedans travel at 40 mph with a 1-second following gap. The lead car brakes for a yellow light and the follower rear-ends it.
An SUV drifts into the oncoming lane on a curve and hits a pickup head-on, both traveling at 35 mph.
A cyclist riding through a red light at 15 mph is struck by an SUV crossing the intersection at 30 mph.
Two SUVs in a parking garage back out from opposite spaces and collide with each other at 5 mph.
A sedan at 25 mph hits a pedestrian who walks out from a bus stop into traffic without looking.
A pickup making a wide right turn at 10 mph swings into an intersection and is struck by a sedan at 35 mph from the left.
A sedan at 30 mph rear-ends a bicycle traveling at 8 mph that was obscured by a parked delivery truck.
An SUV at 30 mph changes lanes to the left and sideswipes a motorcycle traveling in its blind spot at 35 mph.
A sedan at 40 mph enters a one-way street the wrong direction and collides head-on with an oncoming SUV at 30 mph.
An SUV at 45 mph blows through a stop sign obscured by overgrown bushes and T-bones a sedan at 25 mph in the cross street.
A motorcycle at 45 mph rear-ends a sedan that braked suddenly when a traffic light turned red unexpectedly early.
A motorcycle at 35 mph strikes a pedestrian who darts across the street outside of a crosswalk.
A rear passenger in a parked sedan opens the door into traffic. A motorcycle at 25 mph swerves but clips the door.
A sedan at 20 mph entering a roundabout is struck by an SUV already in the circle at 25 mph that did not yield.
A sedan and pickup are stopped at a railroad crossing. A third sedan at 30 mph fails to stop and rear-ends the pickup.
A sedan makes a U-turn from the left lane and sideswipes an SUV passing on the right at 30 mph.
Two motorcycles on a narrow two-lane road collide head-on when one crosses the center line at 30 mph each.
A sedan at 35 mph with a green light T-bones a pickup that entered the intersection late after a stale yellow at 20 mph.
An SUV backing out of a parking space at 5 mph strikes a bicycle riding through the parking lot at 8 mph.
An SUV at 30 mph runs a red light and strikes a pedestrian crossing in the crosswalk on a walk signal.
A pickup at 35 mph rear-ends a sedan that is slowly merging onto the road at 10 mph from a side street.
A pickup at 30 mph fails to see a motorcycle at 40 mph approaching from the right at an intersection with obscured sight lines.
A sedan at 25 mph sidles into the bike lane and sideswipes a bicycle traveling at 15 mph.
A pickup drifts left on a two-lane road at 35 mph while drowsy and collides head-on with an oncoming sedan at 35 mph.
A sedan at 30 mph turns left at an intersection and cuts off an SUV going straight at 40 mph, resulting in a broadside collision.
A sedan at 45 mph on a highway rear-ends a pickup that suddenly slowed to 10 mph due to a tire blowout.
A pickup at 20 mph in a school zone hits a child pedestrian who runs out from behind a parked car.
A motorcycle at 45 mph running a stale green hits a sedan that jumped the green early at 15 mph from the cross street.
A sedan backing out of a garage at 5 mph hits a pedestrian walking on the sidewalk behind the driveway.
Two SUVs traveling at 40 mph on a highway sideswipe while one drifts across the lane marker.
A sedan following a motorcycle at 35 mph rear-ends it when the motorcycle brakes for a pothole the sedan driver cannot see.
Two sedans collide head-on at 25 mph each on a narrow residential street when neither pulls over for the other.
An SUV at 40 mph runs a red light and T-bones a motorcycle at 20 mph that just entered the intersection.
A taxi passenger opens the rear door into a bike lane. A bicycle at 15 mph crashes into the door and is thrown over the handlebars.
A sedan at 40 mph crests a hill and finds a stopped SUV on the other side. Unable to brake in time, it rear-ends the SUV.
